'''gohawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xian|xian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xian|xian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gohawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohawithi|gohawithi]] || [[word:gohawiji|gohawiji]] || [[word:gohawishi|gohawishi]] || [[word:gohawiki|gohawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohawuthuthu|gohawuthuthu]] || [[word:gohawujuju|gohawujuju]] || [[word:gohawushushu|gohawushushu]] || [[word:gohawukuku|gohawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohawuthu|gohawuthu]] || [[word:gohawuju|gohawuju]] || [[word:gohawushu|gohawushu]] || [[word:gohawuku|gohawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohawufthuf|gohawufthuf]] || [[word:gohawufjuf|gohawufjuf]] || [[word:gohawufshuf|gohawufshuf]] || [[word:gohawufkuf|gohawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohawethe|gohawethe]] || [[word:gohaweje|gohaweje]] || [[word:gohaweshe|gohaweshe]] || [[word:gohaweke|gohaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohawothotho|gohawothotho]] || [[word:gohawojojo|gohawojojo]] || [[word:gohawoshosho|gohawoshosho]] || [[word:gohawokoko|gohawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohawotho|gohawotho]] || [[word:gohawojo|gohawojo]] || [[word:gohawosho|gohawosho]] || [[word:gohawoko|gohawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohawofthof|gohawofthof]] || [[word:gohawofjof|gohawofjof]] || [[word:gohawofshof|gohawofshof]] || [[word:gohawofkof|gohawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfthĂŻf|gohawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfjĂŻf|gohawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfshĂŻf|gohawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfkĂŻf|gohawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gohawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gohawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gohawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gohawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfthĂŻf|gohawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfjĂŻf|gohawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfshĂŻf|gohawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfkĂŻf|gohawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfthĂŻf|gohawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfjĂŻf|gohawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfshĂŻf|gohawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohawĂŻfkĂŻf|gohawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohawĂŠthĂŠ|gohawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gohawĂŠjĂŠ|gohawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gohawĂŠshĂŠ|gohawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gohawĂŠkĂŠ|gohawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohawathatha|gohawathatha]] || [[word:gohawajaja|gohawajaja]] || [[word:gohawashasha|gohawashasha]] || [[word:gohawakaka|gohawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohawatha|gohawatha]] || [[word:gohawaja|gohawaja]] || [[word:gohawasha|gohawasha]] || [[word:gohawaka|gohawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohawafthaf|gohawafthaf]] || [[word:gohawafjaf|gohawafjaf]] || [[word:gohawafshaf|gohawafshaf]] || [[word:gohawafkaf|gohawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gohawasha|gohawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohawshĂ«sha|gohawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohawrosha|gohawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawmusha|gohawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohawyasha|gohawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohawnkshĂ«sha|gogohawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohawnkrosha|gogohawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohawnkmusha|gogohawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohawnkyasha|gogohawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gohahawasha|gohahawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohahawshĂ«sha|gohahawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohahawrosha|gohahawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohahawmusha|gohahawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohahawyasha|gohahawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohahawnkshĂ«sha|gogohahawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohahawnkrosha|gogohahawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohahawnkmusha|gogohahawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohahawnkyasha|gogohahawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gehĂŠwasha|gehĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gehĂŠwshĂ«sha|gehĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gehĂŠwrosha|gehĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gehĂŠwmusha|gehĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gehĂŠwyasha|gehĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogehĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gogehĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogehĂŠwnkrosha|gogehĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogehĂŠwnkmusha|gogehĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogehĂŠwnkyasha|gogehĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gohfawasha|gohfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohfawshĂ«sha|gohfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohfawrosha|gohfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohfawmusha|gohfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohfawyasha|gohfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohfawnkshĂ«sha|gogohfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohfawnkrosha|gogohfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohfawnkmusha|gogohfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohfawnkyasha|gogohfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
